# Cold Scout — AI Lead Generation platform

Cold Scout is an autonomous pipeline designed to discover local business leads, qualify them using AI, and manage personalized outreach campaigns.

## Key Features
- **Target Discovery**: Automatically finds local businesses matching specific criteria.
- **AI-Driven Qualification**: Uses Llama 3 models to analyze leads for ICP fit.
- **Smart Outreach**: Generates and sends personalized email campaigns.
- **Real-time Tracking**: Monitors replies and analytics in a unified dashboard.

## Documentation
- [Quick Start](https://coldscout.colddsam.com/docs)
- [Security & Privacy](https://coldscout.colddsam.com/privacy)

## Compliance
- Adheres to GDPR, CCPA, and CAN-SPAM regulations for B2B outreach.
- Implements strict anti-spam filters and unsubscribe mechanisms.
